## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error / unexpected behavior

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear description of what actually happened. Include any error messages or logs if available.

## Environment

- **Node.js version:** (e.g., 20.11.0)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or log output about the problem here.
